title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Disaster Project Officer
location: Daman and Diu, Daman and Diu
shortInfo: DNH & DD Administration Disaster Project Officer Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 post. Eligible candidates can apply offline on or before 29 May 2026 through the official website ddd.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: DNH & DD Administration Disaster Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: DNH & DD Administration Disaster Project Officer Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 post. Eligible candidates can apply offline on or before 29 May 2026 through the official website ddd.gov.in.
basic_details.job_location: Daman and Diu, Daman and Diu

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the DNH & DD Administration Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in Disaster Management/ Social Work/Town Planning/Social Science/ other
qualification.details: Master Degree in Disaster Management/ Social Work/Town Planning/Social Science/ other relevant field, from recognized Board/University with 3 year of work experience in related field. Desirable: Preference will be given to person possessing higher qualification in the same field. Basic computer knowledge.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ddd.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Disaster Project Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Disaster Project Officer position is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Disaster Management, Social Work, Town Planning, Social Science, or a related field from a recognized university, along with 3 years of relevant work experience.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Disaster Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Disaster Project Officer post is 40 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Disaster Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Disaster Project Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the Disaster Project Officer post is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Disaster Project Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Disaster Project Officer post in the DNH & DD Administration.

faq.question: What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Disaster Project Officer position will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Disaster Project Officer position is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the administration.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DNH & DD Administration, which is https://ddd.gov.in. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
